sailormoonposters_dream: ^NOUR: No way! Finally, some Sailor Moon merchandise with Uranus and Neptune!

sailormoonposters_gender: ^NOUR: I love when anime characters subvert gender roles.
^NOUR: And when Uranus would wear a suit, man, I thought she looked so cool...
^NOUR: I fantasized about being like her.

sailormoonposters_realvisited: ^NOUR: Yeah, that's more like it! Uranus and Neptune together.
sailormoonposters_nickanime: ^NICK: Woah, they're like manga characters! They look super cool!
sailormoonposters_real: ^NOUR: This Sailor Moon poster is great and all, but... I'd love to see more Sailor Uranus merchandise.
sailormoonposters_dreamvisited: ^NOUR: Ah, it's just Sailor Moon again.
